notes: API: swagger documents NO releaseYear/releaseMonth data endpoint; an undocumented one is rumoured (StackOverflow/community) but cannot be confirmed without an API key
API: every /api/psd/* request (even nonexistent paths) returns 403 without an API key, so endpoint existence cannot be probed unauthenticated; no key is configured in this environment
bulk stores exactly ONE row per (commodity,country,MY,attribute) — only the latest revision survives; historical vintages are NOT in the current file
revision identity: past revision chains unrecoverable from current bulk; forward ingests accumulate true vintages via distinct release_date
wayback: CDX API rate-limited/unavailable during audit — snapshot census unknown; do not assume archive coverage
